  1. Home
  2. Benefits
  3. Employee Holidays

Employee Holidays

The following days are designated as University holidays for employees who are scheduled to work.  University holidays are designated on a calendar year basis, not to exceed 15 days per year, per IHL Board Policy.

Calendar Year 2026

Christmas-New Year/Winter Holiday Thursday 1 January 1, 2026
M.L. King, Jr. Day Monday 1 January 19, 2026
Good Friday/Spring Holiday Friday 1 April 3, 2026
Memorial Day Monday 1 May 25, 2026
Independence Day Friday 1 July 3, 2026
Labor Day Monday 1 September 7, 2026
Thanksgiving Day Thursday 1 November 26, 2026
Following Day Friday 1 November 27, 2026
Christmas-New Year/Winter Holiday Beginning Wednesday 7 December 23, 2026, through January 1, 2027
  Last Day Worked   Tuesday, December 22, 2026
  Return to Work   Monday, January 4, 2027
Total Calendar 2026 Holidays   15

 

Calendar Year 2027

Christmas-New Year/Winter Holiday Friday 1 January 1, 2027
M.L. King, Jr. Day Monday 1 January 18, 2027
Good Friday/Spring Holiday Friday 1 March 26, 2027
Memorial Day Monday 1 May 31, 2027
Independence Day Monday 1 July 5, 2027
Labor Day Monday 1 September 6, 2027
Thanksgiving Day Thursday 1 November 25, 2027
Following Day Friday 1 November 26, 2027
Christmas-New Year/Winter Holiday Beginning Thursday 7 December 23, 2027, through December 31, 2027
  Last Day Worked   Wednesday, December 22, 2027
  Return to Work   Monday, January 3, 2028
Total Calendar 2027 Holidays   15  

Calendar Year 2028

M.L. King, Jr. Day Monday 1 January 17, 2028
Good Friday/Spring Holiday Friday 1 April 14, 2028
Memorial Day Monday 1 May 29, 2028
Independence Day Tuesday 1 July 4, 2028
Labor Day Monday 1 September 4, 2028
Thanksgiving Day Thursday 1 November 23, 2028
Following Day Friday 1 November 24, 2028
Christmas-New Year/Winter Holiday Beginning Wednesday 8 December 20, 2028, through January 1, 2029
  Last Day Worked   Tuesday, December 19, 2028
  Return to Work   Tuesday, January 2, 2029
Total Calendar 2028 Holidays   15
